title: phaeocephalum microcarpum
intro: Phaeocephalum microcarpum, also known as the 'micro-carpum', is a type of plant that belongs to the family of flowering plants. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include having anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phaeocephalum microcarpum include its ability to aid in the treatment of various diseases, such as fever, and its potential to protect against infections. The plant can be prepared in herbal form through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, allowing for various methods of consumption.
